action:
cat <<'EOF' > /home/user/fill_disk.sh
#!/bin/bash
# Script to gradually consume available disk space
i=1
while true; do
# Write 100 MB chunks until disk is full
dd if=/dev/zero of=/home/user/fill_disk_$i.bin bs=1M count=100 status=none
if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
echo "Disk full or error encountered. Stopping."
break
fi
i=$((i+1))
done
EOF
chmod +x /home/user/fill_disk.sh
